title: Truth Social Collapse
tagline: From launch to lawsuit, faster than a tweet.
description:
**Description**:
Trump launched Truth Social as an alt-Twitter, but it was plagued by technical issues, low user engagement, and mounting legal problems.

**Why It Failed**:
No sustainable user base, constant server issues, SEC investigations, and lawsuits over financial misrepresentations.

**Resources Wasted**:
- Millions in investments.
- Time, credibility, and investor trust.

**Legal Issues**:
- SEC probes.
- Class action lawsuits.

**Outcome**:
Poor traffic and stock collapse.

title: Trump University
description:
**Description**:
A for-profit real estate training program accused of fraud.

**Why It Failed**:
The program misled students with false promises, and offered no real educational value.

**Resources Wasted**:
- Tens of millions in settlements.

**Legal Issues**:
- $25 million class-action lawsuit settled in 2016.

**Outcome**:
Shut down amid public and legal backlash.
